import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_filter_expensive_items_with_string_prices():
    # Item B has string price '200' > 150, so it should be included.
    # Item A has int price 100, excluded. Item C has string price '150',
    # which equals threshold so strictly-greater-than excludes it too.
    items = [
        {'name': 'A', 'price': 100},
        {'name': 'B', 'price': '200'},
        {'name': 'C', 'price': '150'},
    ]
    result = source.filter_expensive_items(items, 150)
    names = [item['name'] for item in result]
    assert names == ['B']
    # Boundary: price equal to threshold must be excluded
    assert source.filter_expensive_items([{'name': 'X', 'price': '150'}], 150) == []
